selected_title: Introduction: Civil Society and Democracy: The Latin American Case
question: What mechanism does Carlos H. Waisman identify in “Introduction: Civil Society and Democracy: The Latin American Case” that deepens the evidence from “Decentralization, democratic governance, and civil society in comparative perspective: Africa, Asia, and Latin America”?

evidence_spans.text: Acentral feature of the revival of democracy in Latin America in the past two decades has been the awakening, or reawakening, of civil society in the region. The purpose of this volume is to examine the relationship between these two processes.
